mapper.insert: insert into batch.batch_window ( tenant_id, window_code, window_name, timezone, start_time, end_time, end_strategy, out_of_window_action, allow_cross_day, enabled, description ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{windowCode}, #{windowName}, #{timezone}, #{startTime}::time, #{endTime}::time, #{endStrategy}, #{outOfWindowAction}, #{allowCrossDay}, #{enabled}, #{description} ) on conflict (tenant_id, window_code) do update set window_name = excluded.window_name, timezone = excluded.timezone, start_time = excluded.start_time, end_time = excluded.end_time, end_strategy = excluded.end_strategy, out_of_window_action = excluded.out_of_window_action, allow_cross_day = excluded.allow_cross_day, enabled = excluded.enabled, description = excluded.description, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.update: update batch.batch_window set window_name = #{window_name}, timezone = #{timezone}, start_time = #{start_time}::time, end_time = #{end_time}::time, end_strategy = #{end_strategy}, out_of_window_action = #{out_of_window_action}, allow_cross_day = #{allow_cross_day}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenant_id} and id = #{id}
